name: not-found
title: Not Found (404)
description: The Enjab 404 page. REQUIRED in every Enjab project (never the framework default). A centered gradient mark + 404 + a back-home button + the 'an Enjab product' byline. Edit the GLYPH to match your favicon and set the tool name + home href. Drops app/not-found.tsx into the Next.js app dir.
